texto: Yet a mysterious gate lay open within her shadow
autor: and all my flesh was aware of black pathways and hovels and the silence one observes when the dead are near.
explicacao: Citação de and all my flesh was aware of black pathways and hovels and the silence one observes when the dead are near. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Yet a mysterious gate lay open within her shadow” articula reflexao, joe-bousquet, mysterious em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
